{{Quote|Why is this still making news? The [expletive deleted] Republic is tearing itself apart, and we're talking about a snot-nosed brat and his whining mother.|Wuuden Malnic|<ref name="Jedi Watch" />}}
'''Wuuden Malnic''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Courier/Legends|courier]] living on the [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="Jedi Watch" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|jediwatch/1337_1.html|Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi}} is set on the date 13:3:7, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> Malnic was once asked by a [[Journalist/Legends|journalist]] from [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]] what the Rodian thought of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] refusing to return the six-[[Standard month/Legends|month]]-old [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Aris-Del Wari|Ludi]] to her [[Parent/Legends|mother]], [[Jonava Billane]], in the [["Baby Ludi" custody case]].<ref name="Jedi Watch" />

Malnic responded that it did not make sense why the media cared so much about the case when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was falling apart due to the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. The Rodian was so upset about the situation that Malnic swore while being interviewed. Wuuden had had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and green skin, and on at least one occasion, wore red [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]].<ref name="Jedi Watch" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wuuden Malnic first appeared in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 46|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #46]], an issue of the representation of the [[in-universe]] HoloNet News, published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="Jedi Watch" /> on [[March 7]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">Per {{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4#post-6042498}}, [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]] was released on [[March 14]], [[2002]]. As [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] segments were published weekly, and {{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|jediwatch/1337_1.html|Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi}} was published in the issue immediately preceding the forty-seventh edition, it must have been released on [[March 7]] of the same year.</ref> Malnic was created by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]],<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|text=HoloNet News - Credits}}</ref> and they were pictured in an article entitled "Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi,"<ref name="Jedi Watch" /> which was illustrated by artist [[Joe Corroney]].<ref name="Credits" />
